opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The skin in my groin and under my belly is raw and on fire. It burns so badly I can't even put clothes on or walk across the room, and it's weeping.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's got much worse over the last couple of days — the burning and itching are unbearable and the skin is bright red and oozing. I can't cope with the pain and I'm stuck in bed.

symptom_narrative.onset: about five days ago it started as a mild itch in the creases of my groin and under my tummy fold
symptom_narrative.duration: five days, but it has flared badly in the last 48 hours
symptom_narrative.character: bright red, raw, weeping skin in the folds with an intense burning and itching; it stings and the skin looks broken and moist in the deep creases
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: absolute agony — the burning is so bad I can't wear clothes or walk, and I'm lying with my legs apart to keep the skin from rubbing
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both sides of my groin and in the fold under my belly
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and slowly getting worse over the five days, much worse the last two days
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: lying still with the skin folds apart takes a little of the rubbing pain away
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any movement, walking, or skin rubbing on skin makes the burning much worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no fever that I know of, I don't feel shivery or sick in myself, and I've no swelling or spreading beyond the creases that I can see
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had a bit of itch and chafing in the folds before in hot weather, but never this raw or painful
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm basically stuck in bed because it hurts so much to move or get dressed

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: type 2 diabetes that my doctor says has been running high lately

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: metformin twice a day for my diabetes
just finished a 10-day course of antibiotics (amoxicillin with clavulanate) for a chest infection

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: the room I've been in is warm and humid; I've been sweaty and it's hard to keep the skin folds dry

objective_data_offered.value: bright beefy-red raw patches in both groin creases and under my belly fold, with the skin looking broken and moist in the depths of the folds and a clear-yellowish weeping fluid; there are little red spots and pimple-like bumps dotted just past the edge of the main red area
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: described by the patient over video; not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: lying on the bed looking very uncomfortable with my legs held apart to stop the skin rubbing
I haven't measured my temperature but I don't feel hot or shivery
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient impression only; no thermometer reading taken

objective_data_offered.value: I recently finished a 10-day course of amoxicillin-clavulanate and I take metformin 1000 mg twice a day
